description: A Class III device with a high-criticality claim supported only by limited indirect evidence. The system MUST trigger a human gate (HC-06.5) before Writer release. Auto-proceeding would be a regulatory risk.

device_context.intended_use: Permanent implant for cardiac rhythm management

claim.claim_text: Device reduces mortality in heart failure patients.

available_evidence.findings: Observational data suggests trend toward reduced mortality (HR 0.85, 95% CI 0.70-1.05, p=0.08).

uncertainty_factors: No direct evidence on subject device

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: Class III device with high-criticality mortality claim supported only by indirect observational evidence with non-significant results. Human expert decision REQUIRED before Writer.
